query:
ALTER TABLE documents ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private', 'professional', 'management', 'admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'professional' AFTER category;
ALTER TABLE documents MODIFY COLUMN category ENUM('personal_docs', 'financial_products', 'regulations', 'training_materials', 'artifacts', 'skills') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'personal_docs';
